privileged_info_summary: The task configures a WooCommerce flash sale with synthetic test data. Three products exist with SKUs WBH-001 (Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, regular price $79.99), YMP-001 (Yoga Mat Premium, regular price $39.99), and LED-DL-01 (LED Desk Lamp, regular price $49.99), all created via WP-CLI during environment setup. The task requires setting sale prices to $59.99, $29.99, and $34.99 respectively, assigning all three to a new 'Flash Sale' category, and creating a coupon 'FLASH30' with 30% discount, $50 minimum spend, 100 usage limit, Flash Sale category restriction, and expiry date 2026-12-31.
